docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,045.33 FILED BY DOYLE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOYLE, DANIEL
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,045.33 AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED JUL-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL MAGUELO FILED BY DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DANIEL DOYLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOYLE, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. CIVIL CODE 1950.5 AUTHORIZES, BUT DOES NOT MANDATE, AN AWARD OF DOUBLE DAMAGES FOR BAD FAITH RETENTION RETENTION OF TENANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLANTIFF FAILED TO MEET BURDEN OF PROVING 1 WEEK DELAY IN RETURN OF FULL SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS DONE IN BAD FAITH. DEFENDANT CREDIBLY EXPLAINED ADMINISTRATIVE ISSUE THAT BRIEFLY DELAYED RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
